name: ship-main-deck
summary: The top deck of a working ship — mast footings, coiled rigging, the helm aft, hatches amidships, gunwales lined with belaying pins.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: long narrow rectangle with tapered bow

primary_palette.note: main mast with rigging pinned to the fife rail
working deck around the main hatch

story_prompts: boarding action in progress — grappling lines over the gunwale
mid-storm — crew fighting a flogging sail
ship is becalmed — nothing moves, sails slack, silence wrong
a merchant vessel, peaceable — customs inspection boarding

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: full daylight (0.8-1.0) by day, dark with binnacle glow by night

anti_patterns: always taper the bow — a ship deck is not a rectangle
masts are anchors, not clutter — leave clear working radius around each
rope coils against the gunwale, not in the middle of the walk-space
